en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: ari veli, inika ken a na masi qecap uta.
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.

ab: kiciur sun a veneli ta inpic?
en: A: Let's go buy a pen.

ab: ui, uri veneli aken ta siquliqulip uta.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: ari a veneli ta tja kenamain.
en: A: Let's go buy breakfast.

ab: ini, na kenama anga aken i tjumaq.
en: B: No, I've already eaten at home.

ab: namadraudrau aken a semeljec ta ku tjinaljek.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!
A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!
A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: uri keman aken i gakku ta ku cengelj.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.
A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: na kemacu aken ta ku kanen, kaciuri a keman.
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!
A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let's go.
A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: ini, liaw aravac a ku vaveciken.
ch: B:不要，我還有很多作業要寫。
en: B: No, I want to study.
A: Please help me with the broom.
B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.
A: Help me get the rag.

ab: paalapan tjai kuliw, semuasuap anan aken.
ch: B:我還在掃地，你叫kuliw幫你拿。
en: B: I'm still sweeping the floor, you ask kuliw to help you.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don't you clean up?
B: I've finished cleaning up.

ab: saw! djuasi azua namakungay a zaleman.
en: A: Go wipe the dirty floor.
B: Okay, I'll go get the cloth.

ab: saw djuasi a azua namaqungevuljan a qezung.
ch: A:窗戶都是灰塵，去擦一下。
en: A: The windows are full of dust, go wipe them.

ab: inika aken a makadjuas, kedri aravac aken.
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm still sweeping the floor.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I'm going to see my teacher.
Do you want to go home later?

ab: uri vaik amen a semenay kata ku qali.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.

ab: uri kemuda timadju nu qemacuvung ta vaveciken?
en: A: What does he do after he finishes his homework?
B: He's going swimming.
